Chanel.drift_log: Consistent historical positioning relying on timeless monument-building.

Hermes.drift_log: Historically much softer and poetic, inviting the user into a quiet natural world.

YSL.drift_log: Extreme vulnerability and intimacy driven by the 'whispered secret' and seductive nature of Black Opium.

Maison Margiela.drift_log: Hyper-focused on exact personal memory and delicate, individual vignettes.

Jean Paul Gaultier.drift_log: Consistently theatrical and heavily reliant on collective, shared cultural archetypes.

Viktor & Rolf.drift_log: Avant-garde but firmly rooted in public spectacle and outward-facing magical universes.

Mancera.drift_log: Maintained an elite, gatekept dominance tailored to a specific audience.

Creed.drift_log: Pure historical dominance based on generational legacy and royal artisan positioning.

Byredo.drift_log: Maximum historical vulnerability and private truth, framed as a literal naked diary extension.
